freelance.title: Freelance Developer
freelance.description: I build websites and web apps as a freelancer using HTML/CSS/JS, React/Next.js, and WordPress. Lately I've been using AI tools and LLM APIs a lot — faster builds, smarter features. My setup: Cursor as my IDE, plus Claude Code, Codex, and ChatGPT in VS Code.

vicon.title: VICON Web Business
vicon.description: Client websites with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Responsive themes and templates with Contao, plus backend work like database and server setup.

andersBjork.title: Anders Björk GmbH
andersBjork.description: Responsive WordPress themes with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP. Kept live sites running smoothly, improved performance, and updated existing themes.

eTailersIss.title: eTailers ISS GmbH
eTailersIss.description: Built and maintained websites with HTML and CSS. Implemented and tweaked templates and JavaScript features.

parrotMedia.title: Parrot Media GmbH
parrotMedia.description: Client websites with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Worked on TYPO3 projects — template and layout tweaks, testing, and bug fixes.
